title: Persist Task output as attachments only

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigated failed Suco optimizer procedure c8576357-1122-4c40-9c3c-854baa7fdaba. Root cause is updateTask writing full experiment_result into Task.output in experiment_runner, which exceeded DynamoDB item size. Plan is to hard-break Task.output to compact envelope + task attachment only, reusing existing taskAttachments bucket and attachedFiles path.
